title: SpaceX stock closes below debut price at $148 in two-day slide after Nasdaq-100 inclusion
summary_full: SpaceX's record IPO raised a total of $85.7 billion after underwriters exercised the "greenshoe" overallotment.
summary_public: SpaceX's record IPO raised a total of $85.7 billion after underwriters exercised the "greenshoe" overallotment.
